articles.title: Physicists finally solve the strange mystery of “breathing” lasers
articles.description: Scientists have finally figured out how mysterious “breather” laser pulses work, solving a puzzle that has frustrated laser physicists for years. These unusual ultrafast lasers produce light pulses that rhythmically grow and shrink instead of staying steady, almost like they’re breathing.

articles.title: Jupiter’s lightning may be 100x more powerful than Earth’s
articles.description: Jupiter’s storms aren’t just gigantic — they may unleash lightning far more powerful than anything on Earth.
